name: profiles/active.sh prints the resolved rule set for the active profile when invoked with show-rules
command:
mkdir -p profiles .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'active_profile: p
' > .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml && printf 'rules:
  no-eval: error
  no-console: warn
' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" --show-rules --state .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml --profiles-dir profiles 2>out.txt && grep -q 'no-eval: error' out.txt && grep -q 'no-console: warn' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
